abort.already_configured: This Delhaize account is already configured
abort.mfa_session_expired: The Delhaize MFA setup session expired
abort.wrong_account: The provided Delhaize account does not match this config entry

error.captcha_required: Delhaize rejected the password login because a browser captcha token is required. No temporary email code is sent in this case. Paste a Cookie header from an already logged-in browser session.
error.login_failed: Login failed. Check the credentials or Cookie header.
error.mfa_required: Delhaize requires multi-factor authentication but did not return a usable MFA token.
error.missing_auth: Provide either a Cookie header or both username and password.

cookie.description: Recommended setup path. Paste the Cookie header from an already logged-in Delhaize browser session.
cookie.title: Delhaize Cookie header

mfa.description: Enter the temporary Delhaize code sent to {otp_target}.
mfa.title: Delhaize verification

user.description: Cookie authentication is selected by default because Delhaize usually requires a browser captcha before the email-code login can start. Leave username and password empty for the Cookie flow. Username and password login remains available, but may fall back to Cookie authentication.
user.title: Set up Delhaize

abort.mfa_session_expired: The Delhaize MFA setup session expired
abort.wrong_account: The provided Delhaize account does not match this config entry

error.captcha_required: Delhaize rejected the password login because a browser captcha token is required. No temporary email code is sent in this case. Paste a Cookie header from an already logged-in browser session.
error.login_failed: Login failed. Check the credentials or Cookie header.
error.mfa_required: Delhaize requires multi-factor authentication but did not return a usable MFA token.

cookie.description: Update the stored Delhaize browser Cookie header.
cookie.title: Update Delhaize Cookie header

credentials.description: Update the Delhaize credentials. Leave password empty to keep the current stored password.
credentials.title: Update Delhaize credentials

init.description: Update Delhaize settings. Authentication fields stay hidden unless you choose to update credentials or the Cookie header.
init.title: Delhaize options

mfa.description: Enter the temporary Delhaize code sent to {otp_target}.
mfa.title: Delhaize verification

entry_id.description: Optional Delhaize config entry id. Leave empty to activate offers for all accounts.
entry_id.name: Config entry
